reviews.review_description: Game won't go past loading screen.  waste of money!!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi RobbieNZ, We're really sorry to hear about your experience with Escape Room – The Mysteries of Egypt. It sounds like the game may not have fully unpacked on first launch this can occasionally happen due to how certain devices handle large OBB files and metadata during initial setup.

Please allow a moment after download for the game to complete its background initialization. Thousands of players are enjoying the adventure, and we’d love for you to be one of them. If the issue persists, our support team is here to help just drop us a line at support@madcreativestudios.com and we’ll do our best to get you exploring ancient mysteries in no time.

Thanks for your feedback, and again, we’re sorry for the inconvenience.
